name: element_pivot
description: Regression guard: element falloff attenuates by distance to the picked element's geometric centre (edge midpoint / face centroid). Four cases (edge, edge-center, polygon, edge-loops) on a 4x4x4 seg cube. AnchorRing verts move at weight=1; surrounding verts attenuate by distance to the element geometry (segment / face plane / loop polyline). Polygon-corner saturation exercises the anchorRing short-circuit; non-corner polygon verts exercise distPointPolygon.
source: Frozen reference capture (xfrm.elementMove, manual interactive pick+drag; element falloff cannot be driven by synthetic input — see private capture-kit notes under tools/local).

input.argstring: prim.cube cenX:0 cenY:0 cenZ:0 sizeX:1 sizeY:1 sizeZ:1 segmentsX:4 segmentsY:4 segmentsZ:4 radius:0
